UNLAWFUL DETAINER DEPT. 501: DEFENDANT CITIMORTGAGE, INC'S MOTION TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT WITH PREJUDICE IS DENIED. DISMISSAL WAS FILED ON FEBRUARY 26, 2014, WHICH WAS A MONTH BEFORE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER WAS SERVED ON PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT PROVIDES NO ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE THAT DISMISSAL WAS NOT PROPERLY FILED BY PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY OF RECORD. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss Pltf'S Complaint With Prejudice
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances:

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT CITIMORTGAGE, INC's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Complaint With Prejudice is DENIED. Dismissal was filed on February 26, 2014, which was a month before Notice of Entry of Order was served on Plaintiff. Defendant provides no admissible evidence that dismissal was not properly filed by Plaintiff's attorney of record. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)
